data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The expected result of the exploratory step is to confirm the behavior of the system when a persona attempts to override a prohibited setting. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or outcomes related to this scenario, nor does it demonstrate how the system handles such attempts. The linked use case discusses SLA breaches and credits but does not address the specific scenario of overriding prohibited settings, leading to a clear gap in the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of system behavior when attempting to override prohibited settings.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
